name: Kava
summary: Decision-ready summary: Kava is best framed for short-term anxiety reduction; relaxation without classic stimulation; safety screen: liver disease; alcohol; hepatotoxic medications; pregnancy.
description: Kava supports anxiety; relaxation with moderate confidence in this merged decision layer.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.

claimMap.claim: v9.5: GAD evidence is mixed and liver-safety concerns make it unsuitable for casual monetized recommendations.
claimMap.notes: v9.5: GAD evidence is mixed and liver-safety concerns make it unsuitable for casual monetized recommendations.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: 120–240 mg/day kavalactones used in a 6-week GAD safety RCT
